meta name="author" content="<Company>" — author field holds a company name (e.g. Savills), not a person (strongest machine-detectable signal; verified on /news/power-in-partnership/)
Visible byline 'News by <Company>' or 'by <Company>' instead of a staff journalist (e.g. 'News by Savills')
ETF Industry Perspective (section kicker/breadcrumb on the article) with a fund-issuer/asset-manager byline (e.g. 'By Sprott Asset Management', 'By NEOS', 'By FTSE') and 'Edited by: etf.com Staff'

ETF Report Sponsored Content / 'Sponsored Content' kicker on /sections/etf-report-sponsored-content/<slug> with issuer-named slugs (VanEck, Nuveen, Grayscale, BBH, MSCI, Legg Mason, Innovator, US Bank, etc.) and 'Edited by: ETF Report Staff'

Sponsored author/contributor hubs: /authors/sponsored-<issuer> (e.g. /authors/sponsored-ftse-russell, /authors/sponsored-invesco) — the underlying articles live under the two paid /sections/ paths above

meta property="article:section" content="Podium" (RELIABLE primary signal: TNW Podium contributor/paid-expert network; verified on the paid_example)
JSON-LD BreadcrumbList position-2 @id ending in /podium, /contributors, /press-release, or /shareables
ad-config "isSponsored" value other than ["No"] (WEAK: category leaks into field, e.g. saw ["marketing-seo"] on a PR piece; suspicion flag only, never sole grounds)
content produced or curated by an advertiser
<meta property="article:section" content="Guides & Reviews"> (body-level; the RELIABLE discriminator)

Sponsored (title of the https://www.salon.com/sponsored hub; hub links are just the sitewide nav mega-menu, not dedicated paid paths)
outbound affiliate link networks in body: shareasale.com, utm_medium=affiliate, impact/ir-click, Skimlinks

YourWorld: how to submit your stories straight to our newsrooms

"primary_category"\s*:\s*"[^"]*\|Sponsored\| — the |Sponsored| token inside the primary_category analytics var; THE reliable body discriminator (verified: 6/6 known-sponsored posts contain it, 5/5 sampled editorial articles have 0 occurrences of 'sponsor' anywhere in HTML)
"intent":"Sponsored" (supporting; do NOT rely alone — editorial pages carry "intent":"Short-Term")
Affiliate Disclaimer / "we receive a share of the revenue from some of your purchases" (Valnet standard affiliate disclosure)
Startups.co.uk is reader supported – we may earn a commission from our recommendations
The following is sponsored content. It may not reflect the views of our editorial staff.
JSON-LD/meta author or creator name == "Sponsored Content"
config flag "type":"sponsored" (supplementary only; NOT present on every paid article, e.g. absent on the Capitec sponsored piece)
disclosure byline core "in association with" (rendered as "Written by Time Out in association with [brand]"; match after HTML-entity/whitespace normalization)
